name: asc-marketing-manager
description: Safely sync localized App Store Connect text metadata with dry-run-first Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Sync localized App Store Connect metadata with dry-run safety.
interface.longDescription: ASC Marketing Manager helps Codex read localized App Store marketing copy from Google Sheets or desired-state JSON, run a safe App Store Connect dry run, and apply only explicitly reviewed text metadata changes.
defaultPrompt: Sync my App Store Connect metadata from a sheet.
Dry-run localized release notes for my app.
Help set up ASC metadata credentials safely.
